extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the first quarter of the series, values stay mostly in the mid range (around 0.3–0.6) without any long, smooth upward or downward trend.  
R2: No strong, monotone rise or fall is maintained from the beginning toward the middle of the series.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first quarter of the series, there is a strong monotone decrease from a high value (around 0.7–0.8) down toward the low range (around 0.2–0.3).  
R2: Around the middle of the series (roughly the second quarter), values remain relatively flat in a narrow mid-range band (around 0.4–0.5) before varying again.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the first 10–15 time steps, the series stays mostly in a mid-range (about 0.3–0.6) without a long, steady initial fall from a high value.  
R2: There is at least one clear dip to a low value (around 0.1–0.2) in the middle or later part of the series, followed by a strong rebound to a higher value (around 0.6–0.7).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts high (around 0.6–0.8) and then shows a pronounced, mostly monotonic drop down to a low value (around 0.2 or below) within the first 10–15 time steps.  
R2: After this early drop, the series oscillates but does not show a strong, sustained return to the initial high level; instead it remains mostly in a low-to-mid range (about 0.2–0.5).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an initial peak, the series stays in a mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.7) for most of its length, with several moderate ups and downs but no long, smooth monotonic rise or fall.  
R2: The series never drops close to zero for more than a very short interval; low values are brief dips rather than a sustained deep valley.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins with a high value and then shows a long, relatively smooth downward trend over the first part of the sequence, rather than oscillating in a band.  
R2: After this long descent, the series has a single prominent rise back to a high level (forming a clear “V” or “U” shape) before ending again in mid-range values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the first peak, the series shows a broad “plateau” or gently sloping region in the middle (roughly between one-third and two-thirds of the length) where values stay around a mid‑level (≈0.4–0.6) rather than dropping sharply.
R2: In the last third of the series, there is at least one pronounced peak where the value rises quickly above ≈0.6 and then falls back down, creating a sharp spike.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Early in the series (first quarter), after an initial high point, the values drop steeply from around ≈0.7 down to near the minimum (≈0.2 or below) without forming an extended mid‑level plateau.
R2: In the middle of the series, there is a single dominant high peak (≈0.7) followed by a rapid decline, after which the series stays mostly below ≈0.5 with only smaller oscillations.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an early peak, the series shows a long, gently decreasing “plateau” or sequence of modest ups and downs, without a single dominant tall peak in the middle.
R2: In the last third of the series, values remain relatively low to medium (no strong final surge past earlier peaks).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series contains one clearly dominant high peak in the middle part of the time axis that stands out above surrounding values.
R2: After this central peak, values drop sharply and stay mostly low to medium, without recovering to the earlier maximum.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an initial small rise, the series quickly drops to a low value and then stays in a mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.6) with several moderate peaks and dips, without a single dominant tall peak in the middle of the sequence.  
R2: In the last third of the sequence the amplitude remains relatively moderate (no very sharp, high spike followed by a deep valley).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The sequence starts with a relatively high value, then drops sharply into a clear low valley early on, and later shows one dominant tall peak in the middle part of the series.  
R2: After that central tall peak, there is a pronounced fall to a low value, followed by a smaller rebound, so the end of the sequence looks like a “big peak then deep dip then small recovery.”

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial few time steps, the series stays mostly in a mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.7) without returning for long to very low values (below about 0.2).
R2: Local peaks tend to be modest and not extremely sharp: there are no single, isolated spikes above roughly 0.8 that are immediately followed by a deep drop below about 0.2.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Early in the series (near the beginning), there is a rapid high peak (around or above 0.7) followed by a steep decline to a much lower level (around or below 0.3).
R2: Later in the series, there is at least one pronounced valley where the value drops near the minimum of the range (close to 0.1–0.2) after having been substantially higher shortly before.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Has no very sharp initial drop; the values in the first 10% of the series stay roughly within a moderate band instead of falling quickly from near‑maximum to near‑minimum.  
R2: After the midpoint of the series, the signal exhibits at least one strong rise back toward a high value (a prominent late upward spike or surge).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Begins with a steep early decline: the value starts high and falls quickly to near the minimum within roughly the first 10–15% of the series.  
R2: Following the middle of the series, does not recover with a strong late surge; instead, it remains relatively low or shows only small, smoother fluctuations without a pronounced final upward spike.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an initial rise, the series spends most of the middle part (roughly one‑third to two‑thirds of the length) in a relatively moderate band without a long, smooth monotonic decrease (it oscillates instead of steadily dropping).
R2: In the last third, there is at least one pronounced upward spike from a low value to a high value, creating a sharp peak near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins with a distinctly high value and then shows a long, relatively smooth overall downward trend from this early peak into the middle of the series (even if there are small local bumps).
R2: After a pronounced dip to a low value in the later part, the series recovers only moderately (no strong final spike back to the initial high level), ending in mid-range values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial 10–15 time steps, the series does not return to a very high peak; instead it stays within a moderate band (roughly between 0.2 and 0.7) with several medium-sized up‑and‑down fluctuations.
R2: In the last third of the series, values remain relatively variable but avoid both very low dips (below about 0.15) and very high spikes (above about 0.75).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series typically rises quickly to a high peak (above about 0.7) near the start and then, after some mid‑series variation, falls to at least one pronounced low dip (below about 0.15) in the second half.
R2: After this deep dip, the series recovers with a noticeable upward movement but ends in a lower, more stable band (roughly 0.3–0.5) without returning to the initial high peak level.
